[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011101011 6
1 001110111 6
2 001011011 5
3 110010001 4
4 011011010 5
5 111111001 7
6 100011111 6
7 101111000 5

01 10 111011000 5
12 21 100000010 2
23 32 011111011 7

45 54 010011100 4
56 65 100000010 2
67 76 000010010 2
70 07 001001001 3

02 20 011011010 5 match 4
13 31 111111001 7 match 5
24 42 100011111 6 match 6
35 53 101111000 5 match 7
46 64 110011110 6
57 75 100010000 2
60 06 001011011 5 match 2
71 17 110010001 4 match 3
